parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Specify whether to overwrite existing data (optional). "True" means you want to overwrite.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: An array of tag labels to attach to a KB document that can be used to filter document eligibility in query retrieval (i.e. tags=label1&tags=label2 or you can use tags=["label1","label2"]).

post.description: Uploads a document to the Knowledge Base (excluding type "url"). Limit is one file per call.

file.description: The file for document types pdf, text, and docx. Limit is one file per call.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs metadata to be included with the file upload. Format: --form metadata:{"key":"value"}. [Learn more](https://developer.voiceflow.com/docs/filter-with-metadata)

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

schema.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

delete.description: Deletes a specific Knowledge Base document by documentID.

get.description: Retrieves the chunks for a Knowledge Base doc by documentID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional pagination parameter - The page number to retrieve, defaults to 1 (which is the minimum). Order is by the date updated, descending.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional pagination parameter - the number of documents to return per page. Defaults to 10, range is 1-100.

parameters.name: documentType
parameters.description: Optional pagination parameter - Filters the document list by type (url, pdf, text, docx). Defaults to all document types.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all documents within a given project's Knowledge Base.

total.description: Total number of Knowledge Base documents.

parameters.name: documentID
parameters.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

schema.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

put.description: Replaces the document and document name in the Knowledge Base, by documentID (excluding type "url"). Limit one per call.

file.description: The file for document types pdf, text, and docx. Limit is one file per call.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs metadata to be included with the file upload. Format: --form metadata:{"key":"value"}. [Learn more](https://developer.voiceflow.com/docs/filter-with-metadata)

documentID.description: A unique identifier of the document object.

tags.description: An array of tag labels associated with the document.

type.description: The type of the source document (url, pdf, text, or docx).

name.description: A readable name for the document.

url.description: The URL for documents of type "url" only.

file.description: The file for document types pdf, text, and docx. Limit is one file per call.

type.description: The type of the source document (url). Limit is one url per call.

name.description: A readable name for the url document. Limit is one url per call.

url.description: The URL for documents of type "url". Limit is one url per call.

chunkID.description: The unique identifier of the chunk. A chunk is a section of text.

content.description: The actual content of the chunk.

maxChunkSize.description: Optional - Determines how granularly each document is broken up. Range available is 500-1500 tokens, default is 1000. Smaller chunk size means narrower context, faster response, less tokens consumed, and greater risk of less accurate answers. Max chunk size affects the total amount of chunks parsed from a document - i.e., larger chunks means less chunks retrieved.

IncludeTags.name: includeTags
IncludeTags.description: An array of KB tag labels to filter documents by.

IncludeAllTagged.name: includeAllTagged
IncludeAllTagged.description: Include all documents with KB tags.

ExcludeTags.name: excludeTags
ExcludeTags.description: An array of KB tag labels to exclude documents.

DialogManagerAPIKey.name: Authorization
DialogManagerAPIKey.description:
All requests made to any Knowledge Base APIs must be validated with a Dialog Manager API Key.

To obtain a Dialog Manager API key, go to the Integration tab on the project you uploaded data sources to and click the "Copy API key" button.
